chapter_title.ar: بَابُ صَيْدِ الْحَرَمِ وَ مَا تَجِبُ فِيهِ الْكَفَّارَةُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 21 – Hunt of the Al-Harram and what expiation is Obligated with regards to it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/91)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/91)
text: رَجُلٍ حَلَّ فِي الْحَرَمِ رَمَى صَيْداً خَارِجاً مِنَ الْحَرَمِ فَقَتَلَهُ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ الْجَزَاءُ لِأَنَّ الْآفَةَ جَاءَتْهُ مِنْ قِبَلِ الْحَرَمِ
قَالَ وَ سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ رَمَى صَيْداً خَارِجاً مِنَ الْحَرَمِ فِي الْحِلِّ فَتَحَامَلَ الصَّيْدُ حَتَّى دَخَلَ الْحَرَمَ فَقَالَ لَحْمُهُ حَرَامٌ مِثْلُ الْمَيْتَةِ.

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziiyad, and Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, altogether, from Ibn Mahboub, from Ibn Raib, from Misma’a Bin Abdul Malik,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding a man, not in Ihram, being inside the Al-Harram, pelts a prey outside from the Al-Harram, so he kills it. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Upon him is the compensation, because the injury came to it from the Al-Harram’.

He (the narrator) said, ‘And I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about a man who pelted a prey outside from the Al-Harram in the unrestricted area. So the prey survives until it enters the Al-Harram. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Its flesh is prohibited like the dead’.
en.sarwar: 14. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad am Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father all from ibn Mahbub from ibn Ri’ab from Misma’ ibn ‘ Abd al-Malik who has said the following: “About a man who, is not in the state of Ihram, shoots from inside of al-Haram (the sacred area) a prey outside of al-Haram (the sacred area) and kills it, abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘There is ransom on him because calamity came upon the bird from al-Haram (the sacred area). 5 I asked him (the Imam), about a man who shoots a prey outside al-Haram (the sacred area) in non-al- Haram (the sacred area) and it moves until it enters al-Haram (the sacred area). He (the Imam) said, ‘Its meat is prohibited for him like a dead animal’s.
